chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Misc. Appeal No.S-13 of 2024 First Appeal No.S-15 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of M.A No. 962/ 2024. 3. For order on M.A No. 114/ 2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2026 Mr. Harish Chander advocate for the appellant/applicant Bhagchand. Mr. Islam Laghari advocate junior partner of Mr. Afzal Kareem Virk advocate for the respondent Jaidev. = Both learned counsel(s) have drawn attention to the statement(s) dated 16-12-2025 whereby, according to them, the matter has been resolved between the parties and jointly request for setting aside the impugned judgment, decree and Order so also the terms agreed between the parties would be implemented. The statement(s) dated 16-12-2025 is perused, which contains signatures of the parties and their respective counsel(s) so also affidavits of the parties alongwith bio-metric oath of Bhagchand and Jaidev have also been annexed; hence in view of above and by consent of learned counsel for both parties, the impugned Judgment dated 18-03-2024 and Decree dated 20-03-2024 passed in Summary Suit No.69 of 2023 so also impugned Order dated 19-07-2024 passed in Execution Application No.04 of 2024 by the learned District Judge, Mirpurkhas, are set aside. The instant Civil Misc. Appeal and First Appeal alongwith pending listed applications are disposed of in above terms. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
